name: AI Agents in TypeScript with Generative AI
description: While the course wasn’t heavily focused on hands-on implementation, it provided a solid understanding of how AI agent frameworks are structured and how their internal processes work. Some of the key concepts I explored:How agent systems are designed in terms of cycles and workflows, The architecture behind tool usage and function-calling mechanisms,How AI agents are structured to interact with external systems.

name: Google Prompting Essentials
description: Completed this hands-on course taught by AI experts at Google, covering how to write clear and effective prompts for generative AI tools using a structured 5-step framework: task, context, references, evaluate, and iterate. Through real-world exercises, I developed skills in using AI to draft content, summarize documents, analyze data, and tackle complex projects — while also building responsible AI practices into my workflow. Earned a certificate from Google upon completion.
